name: IMSS and NOM Site Safety
regulator: Instituto Mexicano del Seguro Social (IMSS) and Secretaria del Trabajo y Prevision Social (STPS)
description: Labor and site-safety context for Mexican construction. Workers must be registered with the IMSS and employer contributions paid, including the construction-industry (obra) obligations. NOM-031-STPS-2011 is the primary construction site safety and health standard, complemented by NOM-009-STPS (work at height) and NOM-001-STPS (premises). Surfaced for compliance reference; safety-document gates are on the roadmap.
